• Life at Salesforce Our Locations Our Locations North America Europe, Middle East, and Africa Asia Pacific Latin America Our Teams Our Teams Sales Technology & Product Customer Success Corporate Roles AI Research University University Overview Interns New Grads Advanced Degrees Associate Program Manager Talent Programs Talent Programs Overview Future Pathways India Return to Work Military Fellows Partner with Account Executives to lead technical discovery, define solution strategies, and ensure recommended architectures align with customer business objectives across Integration, API Management, AI and Data ManagementDesign and deliver tailored demonstrations and Proofs of Concept (PoCs), and own the technical response to RFIs and RFPs throughout the sales cycleFacilitate technical workshops and discovery sessions with diverse stakeholder groups, providing architectural guidance and reframing customer perspectives to drive innovationAct as a trusted advisor to customers and internal teams, translating complex technical requirements into compelling business outcomes using the Salesforce, MuleSoft, and Informatica platform Our Story Newsroom Blog Careers Trust Salesforce.
• Org Sustainability Investors Give us your Feedback Sitemap Legal Terms of Service Privacy Information Responsible Disclosure Trust Contact Manage Preferences 4+ years of experience in solution engineering, technical sales, consulting, or technical implementation, with the ability to engage credibly with both technical and business stakeholdersStrong understanding of the API lifecycle, common integration patterns, and familiarity with cloud technologies including iPaaS, SaaS, automation, and AI agentsProven track record of building and delivering PoCs and responding to technical and functional elements of RFIs/RFPsFluent in German and English Prior experience in a solution engineering or pre-sales role at a software vendor in integration, API management, automation, CRM, or analyticsHands-on experience with Salesforce, MuleSoft, or Informatica, including relevant certifications is a plusDevelopment experience with Java, Python, or similar languages University Overview Interns New Grads Advanced Degrees Associate Program Manager.

• Minimum Qualifications3+ years of software engineering experience with strong CS fundamentalsProficiency in Swift, Objective-C, Python, Go, or another modern language, strong engineers in adjacent stacks will pick up the restYou've shipped software that people used, and you're ready to own bigger pieces end-to-endStrong working proficiency with generative AI coding tools, you've integrated tools like Claude, Cursor, or Codex into how you work, and have a point of view on where they help and where they don'tGenuine interest in software evaluation and quality, you want measurement and data to be central to how you ship, not an afterthoughtComfortable with ambiguity.
• When you're stuck, you dig inStrong communication and a track record of working well across teamsYou seek out feedback and learn fast from the people around youBS in Computer Science or equivalent experience.

• Minimum QualificationsMaster’s degree or foreign equivalent in Information Systems, Computer Engineering, Computer Science or related field and 3 years of experience in the job offered or related occupation.
